abilities.name: healer
abilities.description: Has a 30% chance of curing each adjacent ally of any major status ailment after each turn.

abilities.name: regenerator
abilities.description: Heals for 1/3 max HP upon switching out.

abilities.name: klutz
abilities.description: Prevents the Pokémon from using its held item in battle.
